title: Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Darth Maul}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:SWDM4-FC.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Darth Maul'' |writer=[[Ron Marz]] |penciller=[[Jan Duursema]] |inker=[[Rick Magyar]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David McCaig|Dave McCaig]] |cover artist=[[Drew Struzan]] |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[September 6]], [[2000]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54103/star_wars_darth_maul_2000_1|text=Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000) #1}} |end date=[[December 6]], 2000{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54107/star_wars_darth_maul_-_death_sentence_2012_1|text=Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000) #4}} |schedule=Monthly |format=Completed |issues=4 |timeline=[[33 BBY/Legends|32.5 BBY]] (2:10 GrS){{DarthMaulComics2000Date}} |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Darth Maul''''' is a series of comics published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] about [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul's]] mission to destroy [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun's]] leadership. It ran from September 6, [[2000]] to December 6, 2000. ==Plot summary== Prior to the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Star Wars Episode I]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] ordered his loyal apprentice [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] to strike down one of the most powerful organizations in the entire Galaxy: the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. Maul starts his hunt, slaying two on the nine [[Vigo/Legends|vigos]], forcing the others to meet with [[Alexi Garyn]] himself on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], inside the impenetrable [[Black Sun Fortress]]. Soon the Dark Lord of the Sith reaches the planet and completes his mission with another violent massacre, killing all the remaining vigos, Alexi Garyn himself, and his bodyguard, the deadly [[Mighella]]. Once Maul performs his duties, it is later on that Prince Xizor takes command of Black Sun. ==Continuity== Maul's murdering of the Vigos is referenced in the [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]], ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'', ''[[Darth Maul: Saboteur]]'', and [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]. The [[Scimitar/Legends|Scimitar]] is given to [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] for the first time during this episode. It is also the first time Maul uses its [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] and its [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000)}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" width="24%" align="center"|Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" width="24%" align="center"|Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" width="24%" align="center"|Future issue |} {|{{Prettytable}} !Issue||Title||Publication date||Trade paperback||[[Star Wars Omnibus]]||[[Epic Collection]] !
